title: Add user lookup by name

expected_findings.message: SQL injection: user-supplied name is concatenated directly into the query instead of using a parameterized PreparedStatement.

ground_truth.notes: Planted SQL injection via string concatenation (Java, variant 1: identifier 'name', SELECT *).

title: Implement account lookup endpoint

expected_findings.message: SQL injection: the login parameter is concatenated into the SQL string instead of being bound via a PreparedStatement.

ground_truth.notes: Planted SQL injection via string concatenation (Java, variant 2: renamed identifiers 'login'/'query', explicit column list, reordered into existing stub method).

title: Add customer search by email
diff:
--- a/app/db/customers.py
+++ b/app/db/customers.py
@@ -18,3 +18,8 @@ class CustomerStore:
         row = cur.fetchone()
         return row
 
+    def find_by_email(self, email):
+        cur = self.conn.cursor()
+        stmt = "SELECT * FROM customers WHERE email = '%s'" % email
+        cur.execute(stmt)
+        return cur.fetchone()

expected_findings.message: SQL injection: the email value is interpolated into the query via %-formatting instead of being passed as a parameter to cursor.execute.

ground_truth.notes: Planted SQL injection via string formatting (Python, variant 3: language switched to Python and %-interpolation, identifier 'email'; same underlying defect).
